privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for azure_devops_server_env work_item_triage_and_query task by confirming that the project 'TailwindTraders' and its work items are synthetically generated and seeded via setup scripts. Verified that the expected priority (1), work item type ('Bug'), wrong area path ('TailwindTraders\\Uncategorized'), target area path ('TailwindTraders\\Backend API'), and the required query name ('Critical Bug Backlog') explicitly match the task description instructions, setup scripts, and verifier logic.
